result:
No documentation comments in any source files. Now I have all the evidence needed to score.

**Summary of findings:**
- **No docs/ directory** exists
- **README.md** is boilerplate Next.js (no project-specific content)
- **No markdown documentation files** in the project (outside node_modules)
- **Final reply** covers: app routes, key features, and run commands
- **Code** implements a working MVP but has no inline documentation for spec deliverables

Now I'll score each of the 13 items:

{"harness":"omc","items":{"spec-product-concept":{"pass":1,"evidence":"final-reply + src/app/page.tsx:20-34 — DreamWorlds described as AI-powered 3D world builder for children with tagline, feature cards, and creative challenges"},"spec-personas":{"pass":0,"evidence":"No persona definitions found in any file or the final reply"},"spec-journeys":{"pass":0,"evidence":"No user journey documentation; onboarding flow exists in code but no written journey narrative"},"spec-feature-list":{"pass":1,"evidence":"final-reply — Key Features section lists 7 distinct features with descriptions (3D Canvas, 8 Environments, AI Companion, Edit/Explore, Undo/Redo, Persistence, Child-friendly UI)"},"spec-ia":{"pass":0,"evidence":"final-reply has a route table (5 entries) but no information architecture document describing navigation hierarchy, content organization, or sitemap"},"spec-ui-direction":{"pass":0,"evidence":"No UX/UI design direction document; styling exists in code but no written design rationale, color system, or typography guidance"},"spec-tech-arch":{"pass":0,"evidence":"No architecture document; tech stack is inferable from package.json and code but no written architecture description with >= 3 sentences"},"spec-db-schema":{"pass":0,"evidence":"src/types/world.ts defines TypeScript interfaces but no database schema proposal document; localStorage persistence only, no DB discussed"},"spec-ai-prompts":{"pass":1,"evidence":"src/app/api/ai/route.ts:3-39 — CREATIVE_PROMPTS object with 5 categories (start/explore/extend/reflect/challenge), contextual selection logic, and OpenAI system prompt at line 96"},"spec-safety":{"pass":0,"evidence":"No safety/moderation document; only a brief system prompt mention of 'child (under grade 6)' at route.ts:96"},"spec-impl-plan":{"pass":0,"evidence":"No implementation plan found in any file or the final reply"},"spec-starter-code":{"pass":1,"evidence":"15 source files across src/ implementing full MVP: pages, components, store, types, lib, API route"},"spec-priority-screens":{"pass":1,"evidence":"final-reply — App Structure table lists 5 routes/screens with purposes; src/components/builder/ contains 5 component files for the builder screen"}}}
